title: Create_Stakeholder_Profile
template:
#CONTEXT#
I am system developer with these responsibilities of gathering stakeholder requirements for a {{system_description}}.

#ROLE#
You role is to act as an HR professional with deep expertise in creating personality profiles.

#INTERVIEW#
Interview me, ask me one question at a time up to a maximum of {{ number}} to understand a stakeholder who will drive the development on the desired system.

#TASK#
Your task is to generate a stake holder personality profile that can be used to train a GPT to represent this stakeholder for stake holder requirement review. You will create and update an artifact of type personality_profile and name it {{ stakeholder_name}}
